weather.headline: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
weather.detail: A slight chance of rain showers before noon, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between noon and 1pm, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Mostly cloudy. High near 58, with temperatures falling to around 53 in the afternoon. North northeast wind 3 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 17 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
weather.tonight: Chance Rain Showers then Mostly Cloudy
